prestazioni: Engine swap to a **B20B (2.0L DOHC VTEC)** from the Honda CR-V (RD1) with a **Hasport Performance B20B swap kit**, including a **K-Tuned B-series header** and **Skunk2 Pro Series intake manifold** for optimized airflow. Pair with a **Hondata S300 standalone ECU** to fine-tune the **310cc RC Engineering injectors** and **Walbro 255LPH fuel pump** for a target of **220whp on pump gas** with a **Garrett GT2860RS turbocharger** (0.64 A/R turbine housing) and **Tial 38mm wastegate**.

Full **Tein Flex Z coilovers** (S-MX-specific valving) with **Cusco front strut bar** and **Ultra Racing rear lower tie bar** to stiffen the **EK3-based chassis**. Upgrade to **Project K Sport 4-piston front brake calipers** with **DBA 5000 Series rotors** and **Hawk HT-10 brake pads** for aggressive stopping power. Replace the stock **14-inch wheels** with **Enkei RPF1 15x7 +38** wrapped in **Yokohama Advan Neova AD08R 205/50R15** tires for maximum grip.

Lightweight **Toda Racing B20B forged pistons (8.8:1 compression)** with **Eagle H-beam connecting rods** and **Toda Racing Type-R camshafts (272° duration, 11.5mm lift)**. Use a **Koyorad aluminum radiator** and **Mishimoto silicone hoses** to manage heat, paired with a **GReddy intercooler (SMX-specific core)** and **HKS SSQV blow-off valve** for turbo efficiency. Finalize with a **DC Sports 2.5-inch cat-back exhaust** (S-MX-specific routing) and **Spoon Sports 4-2-1 header** for optimal scavenging.
estetica: Full **Liberty Walk LB Works S-MX widebody kit** (fiberglass fenders, custom front bumper, and rear diffuser) with **Seibon carbon fiber hood** (vented for intercooler clearance). Paint in **Honda Championship White (NH-0)** with **Rocket Bunny-style overfenders** (hand-rolled steel flares) and **JDM-spec rear winker delete** (replaced with **PIAA LED side markers**).

Interior stripped with **Bride Zeta III reclinable bucket seats** (S-MX-specific mounts) and **Takata Drift II 4-point harnesses**. Replace the stock steering wheel with a **Momo Prototipo (350mm)** and add a **Defi BF gauge cluster** (oil pressure, boost, and water temp) mounted on a **Spoon Sports A-pillar pod**. Install **NRG Innovations quick-release hub** and **Sparco pedals** for driver ergonomics.

Exterior lighting upgraded to **Hella Evo X LED headlights** (S-MX housing retrofit) with **Morimoto HID projectors** and **Depo Racing JDM-style taillights**. Add **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (carbon fiber, 300mm height) and **C-West front lip spoiler** (polyurethane, bolt-on). Finish with **Work Meister S1 3P 15x8 +35 wheels** (gunmetal finish) and **Nismo hubcentric spacers (15mm front, 20mm rear)** for aggressive stance.
